title: The Final Stand
prompt: Epic cinematic action movie poster featuring a rugged, bearded male action hero with long windblown hair and intense eyes, waist-up composition holding a heavy shotgun vertically in his right hand, sweat and grime on his skin, tight dark t-shirt clinging to muscular frame, strong low-angle lighting with golden rim backlight and teal atmospheric fill, dramatic volumetric smoke and sparks. In the lower foreground a large naval ship silhouette left, massive explosion and fire midground, a car dramatically flipping and three silhouetted figures struggling on the deck of a vessel right, cinematic scale and depth. High contrast, hyper-detailed photorealism with gritty texture, film grain, subtle lens flares and dust motes, dynamic composition with central dominant hero, warm orange-gold highlights against cool teal ocean and sky, bold distressed block title at bottom, small production credits line beneath, high resolution poster layout, dramatic typography weight, intense, heroic, suspenseful mood.

title: NEON REQUIEM
prompt:
use attached image and to implement below , do not chage the facial details 

Low-angle cinematic poster composition featuring a stoic male portrait in three-quarter view occupying the upper two-thirds of the frame, stylized vector shading with layered flat color planes and strong contours, desaturated golds and olive skin tones rim-lit against a saturated magenta background; he wears a high-collar, quilted satin jacket rendered with sculptural highlights and deep shadows, eyes gazing upward with melancholic resolve. Foreground: classic late-1970s coupe with chrome bumper parked beneath a motel overhang, a smaller full-body figure leaning casually against the hood, silhouette detailed with reflective highlights. Background: sweeping art-deco linear motifs and abstract curves radiating from behind the portrait, screen-printed texture, subtle halftone grain and ink splatter accents. Mood: neo-noir synthwave, moody, retro-futuristic, dramatic lighting, limited three-color palette (magenta, gold/olive, black) with high contrast. Design notes: poster aspect ratio, high-resolution, ample negative space for bold title at bottom in angular script, small production-type blocks and rating strip beneath, intended for giclée or screen print with spot gloss on jacket highlights.

title: God Father
prompt: **IMPORTANT:** Use the attached image as the **only facial reference**. Preserve the exact face, facial structure, eyes, nose, lips, skin tone, hairstyle, age, and expression from the attached photo. **Do not generate a new face, do not replace the identity, and do not alter facial features.** Only change the clothing, pose, lighting, and background. Create a cinematic 1970s vintage mafia movie poster featuring the subject as a powerful elderly mafia don wearing a black tuxedo, white shirt, black bow tie, and a red rose boutonniere. Add naturally aged silver hair and a thin mustache while keeping the original facial identity intact. Close-up three-quarter portrait in the upper half of the poster, seated in deep shadow with his right hand raised near his face in a calm, authoritative gesture. Dramatic film-noir chiaroscuro lighting with warm Venetian-blind backlight, subtle rim light, and soft atmospheric haze. Warm sepia, amber, gold, and deep black color palette with an authentic 1970s film look. Add a large distressed retro serif movie title in cream/gold in the lower third, a puppet-master marionette hand icon above the title, and small classic production credits at the bottom. Ultra-photorealistic, cinematic composition, subtle film grain, vintage paper texture, soft vignette, distressed print finish, poster-quality, 8K.
